## Summary

Describe what this changes and why.

## User benefit

How does this save time, reduce manual effort, improve reports, or make `phm analyze <target>` better?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New analysis feature
- [ ] Reporting/storage improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor

## Tests

- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed

## Safety check

- [ ] This does not add offensive functionality without clear defensive/educational value
- [ ] This does not commit secrets, API keys, reports, databases, or generated artifacts
- [ ] This does not make an external tool or paid API a core dependency
